title: Crossing of accusations and balls out: The battle for the guests shows the war between Pablo Motos and Broncano
text:
‘THE ANTHIVER’ VS. ‘THE REVOLT’
As ABC has learned, Motos and Jorge Martín’s team agreed to an exclusive interview if he won the MotoGP World Championship. Broncano agreed to record the interview with the world champion, without announcing the broadcast date David Broncano in ‘The Revolt’ RTVE
11/22/2024
Updated at 7:45 p.m.
“Don’t miss tonight’s program.” Broncano generated expectations with his ‘Revuelta’ and did not disappoint his audience. Hugh Grant entered the set of Pablo Motos while David Broncano addressed the spectators present both there and in his …
